creator: igor.polovykh@gmail.com
text:
this is output

[ root@bvgvideo /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2 ] # make install
===>  Installing for dovecot-2.2.5
===>   dovecot-2.2.5 depends on shared library: libiconv.so.3 - found
===>   dovecot-2.2.5 depends on shared library: sqlite3.8 - found
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===>  Checking if mail/dovecot2 already installed
pkg-static: PACKAGESITE in pkg.conf is deprecated. Please create a repository configuration file
===> Creating users and/or groups.
Creating group `dovecot' with gid `143'.
Using existing group `dovenull'.
Creating user `dovecot' with uid `143'.
pw: user 'dovecot' already exists
*** [create-users-groups] Error code 74

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2.
*** [install] Error code 1

Stop in /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2.
[ root@bvgvideo /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2 ] #

Fix: 

I do not know how to fix it but I can tell about workaround

# vipw
..
delete user dovecot
# delete from /etc/group dovecot and dovenull
# pwd_mkdb /etc/master.passwd

# cd /usr/ports/mail/dovecot2
# make install


dovecot2 will be installed correctly
How-To-Repeat: just try to install dovecot2 from ports or using portinstall
